text_block_list.text:
We're on the way back from an outing when Hishi
Amazon suddenly stops in front of a signboard.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Check it out! This restaurant serves
American-style barbecue. Man, that takes me
back.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I mean it takes me back to my days when I
was livin' in America! My dad would have
barbecues all the time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I was still a kid back then...
Woosh! Crackle, crackle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My family and I'd go out into the great outdoors,
start up a campfire, and go all-out on our
barbecues.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My dad loves cooking. After he'd grilled up a
huge hunk of meat for me, I'd start gnawing into
it like a wild beast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I watched him cookin' all the time as a kid, so I
eventually learned how to do it myself.
choice_data_list: So that's how you learned to cook!
So that's how you learned to cook!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, more or less! Still teaches me new recipes
to this day. He's a great dad, even though he can
be a little timid.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Except, there's just one thing he would never
teach me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What the most important thing about cooking is!
Every time I asked him, he would answer me with
the same response—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
"That's something you need to figure out for
yourself!"

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Right? It's like he gave me homework to figure
out, except I still don't know what it's about!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I think about it sometimes while cookin', but I still
don't have a clue...
choice_data_list: I'll help you solve the mystery.
I'll help you solve the mystery.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Aw, Teach! Thanks, that'd be great!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, for starters, what do you think is the key to cooking?
choice_data_list: Controlling the intensity of your heat source.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's definitely important! You can't cook
without any heat, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna go buy a stove top for the dorm that can really crank up the heat!
choice_data_list:
I think she's mixed up "controlling heat
intensity" with plain old "heat intensity"...

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is raring to go, so I follow her lead
to the shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... They've got stoves for home cooking
and restaurant-grade ranges. Look at all the
variety.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This Japanese charcoal grill sure stands out like a
sore thumb among all these fancy stoves, though.
Anyway, got any recommendations, Teach?

Since she was so enthusiastic about getting
something that can churn out the heat, and
because I'll be supervising her while she cooks, I
suggest buying a large, heavy-duty burner.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Talk about bringing out the big guns, Teach... I
mean, yeah, that one probably packs the most
firepower...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But it'll be too hard to make minor adjustments to the heat. I want something that's easy to control and super powerful.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Why do you look so surprised? Did I say
something weird?
choice_data_list: I thought you were all about firepower...

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
If you want something that has both power and
fine control, I recommend this stove here.

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text:
You can turn up the heat in an instant, and it's
fitted with a temperature control system for
precision! But there's only one left, so act fast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Incredible! That's exactly what I had in mind!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Everyone, outta my way! The last one's mine!

Despite how brash Hishi Amazon might seem at
first, she is surprisingly attuned to small details.
Maybe that's why she's such a good cook.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: For sure! Fresh ingredients are definitely a must!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let ol' Hishiama show you how to pick
the freshest, best ingredients in the wild!
choice_data_list:
I can't help but feel like she's wildly
misinterpreted what I meant...

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is raring to go, so I follow her lead
until we end up at...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's start at the fishmonger's in this shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Look at all the fish they have swimming in
those tanks! Those are fresh for sure!

I hope she's not planning to grab a live fish with
her bare hands...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll go with the ones they have on display.
All the fish they've got lined up are in season
right now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now let's get some burdock from the
grocer over there. Looks like they've been pulled
fresh from the ground!
choice_data_list: This shopping trip is... surprisingly tame?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean by "tame"? Choosing the right
ingredients is the most basic of basics.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's so many grocery options in the urban
jungle, you've gotta be smart with how you
forage.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My dad might seem like a haphazard cook, but he
knows a thing or two about curing meats too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's stock up! This tiny little shopping
basket's not gonna hold all these, so let's just
bring the whole box up to the register!

Hishi Amazon grabs things off the shelves with
gusto, but she takes great care in making sure she
selects only the best of the best.
